code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut has = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    if has
      nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      has = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    sign = -1
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let doubled = v * 2
  if j == 0
    out = "#{doubled}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{doubled}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
